title: Burjeel Medical City opens advanced neuro-oncology center in UAE | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
summary: The center emerged from a strategic partnership between the Burjeel Cancer Institute and the Neuroscience Institute at BMC, bringing together a multidisciplinary team of leading specialists.

contentHtml:
UAE—Burjeel Medical City (BMC), the premier healthcare facility of Burjeel Holdings, has unveiled a specialized Neuro-Oncology Center designed to deliver cutting-edge care for patients battling brain and nervous system tumors.

This significant development marks a major milestone in the region’s commitment to advancing complex neurological cancer treatment.

Bridging expertise across medical specialties

The center emerged from a strategic partnership between the Burjeel Cancer Institute and the Neuroscience Institute at BMC, bringing together a multidisciplinary team of leading specialists.

The collaborative approach encompasses neurosurgery, medical oncology, radiation oncology, diagnostic imaging, and surgical pathology, ensuring patients receive comprehensive care tailored to their unique needs.

During the inauguration ceremony at Burjeel Medical City, prominent healthcare leaders gathered to mark the occasion.

Dr. Shamsheer Vayalil, Chairman and CEO of Burjeel Holdings, joined Mr. Omran Al Khoori, Member of the Board of Directors, and other senior officials in celebrating this advancement in regional healthcare.

Expanding access to specialized treatment

Dr. Mujtaba Ali Khan, CEO of BMC, emphasized that the Neuro-Oncology Center represents a critical addition to the UAE’s advanced healthcare landscape.

He highlighted the institution’s commitment to making sophisticated, specialized care more readily available to patients throughout the region.

According to Dr. Khan, the facility demonstrates how advanced medical expertise combined with state-of-the-art technology can deliver truly patient-centered treatment experiences.

The center directly addresses a significant global health challenge.

Brain tumors account for nearly 2 percent of all cancer cases worldwide, yet they remain among the most difficult to diagnose and manage due to their proximity to vital brain structures.

This complexity makes early detection and specialized, multidisciplinary intervention essential for improving patient survival and quality of life.

Comprehensive services for all ages

The Neuro-Oncology Center offers a complete range of treatment options designed for both adult and pediatric patients.

Services include advanced neuro-imaging capabilities, molecular and pathological diagnostics, complex surgical procedures for brain and spinal tumors, precision radiation therapy, and modern systemic treatment approaches.

Beyond initial treatment, the center provides ongoing post-treatment monitoring, comprehensive rehabilitation programs, and supportive care services that extend throughout each patient’s recovery journey.

Latest technology drives better outcomes

Prof. Humaid Al-Shamsi, CEO of Burjeel Cancer Institute, described the center as a transformative advancement in neuro-oncology care across the region.

He emphasized that effectively managing central nervous system tumors demands close cooperation among multiple medical specialties working in concert.

Recent scientific breakthroughs have substantially enhanced treatment possibilities for these complex cases.

Molecular tumor profiling, innovative radiation therapy techniques, and newly developed systemic medications have considerably increased survival rates and treatment precision for many patients.

Through this integrated center, the team leverages the most current diagnostic and therapeutic innovations, including precision medicine and targeted therapies, with the ultimate goal of maximizing treatment effectiveness and enhancing patients’ quality of life.

State-of-the-art surgical capabilities

Dr. Mohamed Atef El-Zoghby, Consultant Neurosurgeon and Director of the Neuro-Oncology Center, detailed the facility’s advanced surgical infrastructure.

The center features a sophisticated neurosurgical operating suite equipped with intraoperative MRI technology—a sophisticated system that enables surgeons to capture real-time brain images during procedures.

This groundbreaking capability allows surgical teams to precisely identify tumor locations and verify complete tumor removal without closing the incision, eliminating the need for subsequent surgical interventions. By reducing additional operations, this technology significantly enhances both surgical safety and accuracy.

Furthermore, the operating suite incorporates an advanced neuronavigation system that guides surgeons with exceptional precision throughout complex procedures, providing an additional layer of protection and accuracy for patients undergoing brain surgery.

Strengthening regional healthcare leadership

The establishment of this Neuro-Oncology Center reinforces Burjeel Medical City’s standing as a regional pioneer in highly specialized medical care.

The facility represents the institution’s broader mission to make sophisticated, multidisciplinary healthcare accessible to patients across the region who require treatment for the most complex neurological conditions.
